notes: Patch existing construction scheduled to remain.
Patch existing fire-rated walls, floor ceilings, etc.
Patch walls at removed receptacle openings.
Patch and level floor substrates to receive new work.
Coordinate all floor core drilling with existing.
In rooms with floor drains, slope concrete surface.
All spot elevations shown on the floor plans outside the building relate to USGS elevations.
All angles shown on the floor plans are 90 degrees unless otherwise noted.
All dimensions are to grid line, face of concrete or masonry, or face of gypsum board.
All floor plan dimensions to masonry are nominal dimensions.
pages.summary: This page is a basement floor plan showing various rooms including mechanical, laundry, family, storage, and bedrooms. It includes general notes on construction and patching requirements.
